states.name: Rizette
states.title: Bashful Bunnygirl
states.description: Rizette spent the night before the trip to Orka worrying. About what? The request from Callen, of course. Even imagining wearing a swimsuit was mortifying. So, she picked the one that showed the least amount of skin... but a monster attack and a perverted frog had other ideas.

states.name: Rizette
states.title: Bashful Bunnygirl
states.description: Rizette, moved by the plight of a young girl, agreed to take the place of her imprisoned parents. She was told her role would be as a "waitress", but what she got was a "bunnygirl" outfit. Still, the girl's tears moved Rizette to press forward. Though she felt nothing but apprehension, she was greeted with a loud cheer as she stepped onto the floor.

states.name: Rizette
states.title: Bashful Bunnygirl
states.description:
"Hey, bro! They've got some seriously cute girls working here!"

"No lie, bro! You see that girl over there?!"

Before she knew it, Rizette's table was the most popular table in the casino.
